panels.title: ⚙️ Modo Trading

targets.expr: max without(job, instance, coin, exported_coin, exported_profile) ((btc_price{coin="$coin",profile=~"$profile"}) or (btc_price{exported_coin="$coin",profile=~"$profile"}))

targets.rawSql:
WITH bucketed AS (
  SELECT
    $__unixEpochGroup(timestamp, $__interval) AS "time",
    COALESCE(SUM(pnl), 0)::numeric(12,4) AS pnl_delta
  FROM btc.trades
  WHERE symbol = '$coin'
  AND dry_run = false
  AND ('$profile' = '.*' OR profile ~* '^$profile$')
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  "time",
  SUM(pnl_delta) OVER (ORDER BY "time")::numeric(12,4) AS "PnL Total"
FROM bucketed
ORDER BY 1

WITH bucketed AS (
  SELECT
    $__unixEpochGroup(timestamp, $__interval) AS "time",
    COALESCE(SUM(pnl), 0)::numeric(12,4) AS pnl_delta
  FROM btc.trades
  WHERE symbol = '$coin'
  AND dry_run = false
  AND ('$profile' = '.*' OR profile ~* '^$profile$')
  AND timestamp BETWEEN $__unixEpochFrom() AND $__unixEpochTo()
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  "time",
  SUM(pnl_delta) OVER (ORDER BY "time")::numeric(12,4) AS "PnL no período"
FROM bucketed
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 🎯 Distribuição de Decisões (Total)

targets.rawSql:
WITH api_trades AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      TO_TIMESTAMP(NULLIF(metadata->'fills'->0->>'createdAt', '')::double precision / 1000.0),
      TO_TIMESTAMP(timestamp),
      created_at
    ) AS exchange_time,
    side
  FROM btc.trades
  WHERE symbol = '$coin'
    AND order_id IS NOT NULL
    AND COALESCE(metadata->>'source', '') IN ('kucoin_live', 'kucoin_sync', 'kucoin_restore')
    AND ('$profile' = '.*' OR profile ~* '^$profile$')
)
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(exchange_time, '1h'),
  CASE
    WHEN side = 'buy' THEN '🟢 Compras'
    WHEN side = 'sell' THEN '🔴 Vendas'
    ELSE side
  END AS metric,
  COUNT(*)::double precision AS value
FROM api_trades
WHERE exchange_time BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1, 2

time() - max without(job, instance, coin, exported_coin, exported_profile) ((btc_trading_last_activity_timestamp{coin="$coin",profile=~"$profile"}) or (btc_trading_last_activity_timestamp{exported_coin="$coin",profile=~"$profile"}))

panels.description: Últimas decisões do agente de trading em tempo real (atualiza a cada 15s)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(to_timestamp("timestamp") AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'DD/MM HH24:MI') AS "Data/Hora",
  COALESCE(profile, 'default') AS profile,
  action,
  confidence,
  price,
  reason,
  executed
FROM btc.decisions
WHERE symbol = '$coin'
AND ('$profile' = '.*' OR profile ~* '^$profile$')
AND to_timestamp("timestamp") BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: 📋 Decisões Recentes (Log Rolante)

panels.description: Somente trades confirmados pela API da KuCoin, usando o horario real do fill quando disponivel.

targets.rawSql:
WITH RECURSIVE api_trades AS (
  SELECT
    id,
    COALESCE(
      TO_TIMESTAMP(NULLIF(metadata->'fills'->0->>'createdAt', '')::double precision / 1000.0),
      TO_TIMESTAMP(timestamp),
      created_at
    ) AS exchange_time,
    COALESCE(metadata->>'source', 'api') AS origem,
    COALESCE(profile, 'default') AS profile,
    side,
    price,
    size,
    funds,
    pnl,
    pnl_pct,
    order_id,
    COALESCE(metadata->>'target_sell_trigger_price', metadata->>'target_sell_price') AS sell_target,
    metadata->>'exit_reason' AS exit_reason,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      ORDER BY COALESCE(
        TO_TIMESTAMP(NULLIF(metadata->'fills'->0->>'createdAt', '')::double precision / 1000.0),
        TO_TIMESTAMP(timestamp),
        created_at
      ), id
    ) AS rn
  FROM btc.trades
  WHERE symbol = '$coin'
    AND order_id IS NOT NULL
    AND COALESCE(metadata->>'source', '') IN ('kucoin_live', 'kucoin_sync', 'kucoin_restore')
    AND ('$profile' = '.*' OR profile ~* '^$profile$')
), trade_flow AS (
  SELECT
    id,
    exchange_time,
    origem,
    profile,
    side,
    price,
    size,
    funds,
    pnl AS calc_pnl,
    pnl_pct AS calc_pnl_pct,
    order_id,
    sell_target,
    exit_reason,
    rn,
    CASE WHEN side = 'buy' THEN size ELSE 0::numeric END AS pos_qty,
    CASE WHEN side = 'buy' THEN funds ELSE 0::numeric END AS pos_cost
  FROM api_trades
  WHERE rn = 1

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    at.id,
    at.exchange_time,
    at.origem,
    at.profile,
    at.side,
    at.price,
    at.size,
    at.funds,
    CASE
      WHEN at.side = 'sell' AND at.pnl IS NULL AND tf.pos_qty > 0
        THEN ROUND((at.funds - ((tf.pos_cost / NULLIF(tf.pos_qty, 0)) * at.size))::numeric, 8)
      ELSE at.pnl
    END AS calc_pnl,
    CASE
      WHEN at.side = 'sell' AND at.pnl_pct IS NULL AND tf.pos_qty > 0 AND ((tf.pos_cost / NULLIF(tf.pos_qty, 0)) * at.size) > 0
        THEN ROUND((((at.funds / ((tf.pos_cost / NULLIF(tf.pos_qty, 0)) * at.size)) - 1) * 100)::numeric, 4)
      ELSE at.pnl_pct
    END AS calc_pnl_pct,
    at.order_id,
    at.sell_target,
    at.exit_reason,
    at.rn,
    CASE
      WHEN at.side = 'buy' THEN tf.pos_qty + at.size
      WHEN at.side = 'sell' THEN GREATEST(tf.pos_qty - at.size, 0::numeric)
      ELSE tf.pos_qty
    END AS pos_qty,
    CASE
      WHEN at.side = 'buy' THEN tf.pos_cost + at.funds
      WHEN at.side = 'sell' AND tf.pos_qty > 0 THEN GREATEST(tf.pos_cost - ((tf.pos_cost / NULLIF(tf.pos_qty, 0)) * at.size), 0::numeric)
      ELSE tf.pos_cost
    END AS pos_cost
  FROM trade_flow tf
  JOIN api_trades at ON at.rn = tf.rn + 1
)
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(exchange_time AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'DD/MM HH24:MI') AS "Data/Hora",
  origem,
  profile,
  side,
  ROUND(calc_pnl::numeric, 4) AS pnl,
  ROUND(calc_pnl_pct::numeric, 2) AS pnl_pct,
  price,
  size,
  funds,
  order_id,
  sell_target,
  exit_reason
FROM trade_flow
WHERE exchange_time BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY exchange_time DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: 💵 Disponível (Live)

panels.description: Saldo disponível na conta trade convertido para BRL a partir do último snapshot sincronizado da exchange.

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest_sync AS (
  SELECT MAX(synced_at) AS synced_at
  FROM btc.exchange_balance_snapshots
  WHERE account_type = 'trade'
), latest_balances AS (
  SELECT currency, available, price_usdt
  FROM btc.exchange_balance_snapshots ebs
  JOIN latest_sync ls ON ebs.synced_at = ls.synced_at
  WHERE ebs.account_type = 'trade' AND ebs.available > 0
), brl_rate AS (
  SELECT NULLIF(price_usdt, 0) AS brl_price_usdt
  FROM latest_balances
  WHERE currency = 'BRL'
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT ROUND(SUM(
  CASE
    WHEN lb.currency = 'BRL' THEN lb.available
    WHEN br.brl_price_usdt IS NULL THEN 0
    ELSE (lb.available * COALESCE(lb.price_usdt, CASE WHEN lb.currency = 'USDT' THEN 1 END, 0)) / br.brl_price_usdt
  END
)::numeric, 2) AS value
FROM latest_balances lb
CROSS JOIN brl_rate br

panels.title: 💸 Disponível para Saque (R$)

panels.description: Soma dos aportes fiat em BRL confirmados pela API da KuCoin (MAIN + Fiat Deposit).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0)::numeric, 2) AS value
FROM btc.exchange_account_ledgers
WHERE currency = 'BRL'
  AND account_type = 'MAIN'
  AND direction = 'in'
  AND biz_type = 'Fiat Deposit'

panels.title: 🏦 Total Depositado (R$)

targets.rawSql: SELECT TO_CHAR(to_timestamp(timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'DD/MM HH24:MI') AS "Data/Hora", regime AS "Regime", CONCAT('$', ROUND(price::numeric, 2)) AS "Preço", model AS "Modelo", plan_text AS "Análise" FROM btc.ai_plans WHERE symbol = '$coin' AND ('$profile' = '.*' OR profile ~* '^$profile$') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT TO_CHAR(to_timestamp(timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'DD/MM HH24:MI') AS "Data/Hora", regime AS "Regime", CONCAT('$', ROUND(price::numeric, 2)) AS "Preço", model AS "Modelo", plan_text AS "Análise Completa" FROM btc.ai_plans WHERE symbol = '$coin' AND ('$profile' = '.*' OR profile ~* '^$profile$') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 10

options.content:
📅 {{{data_hora}}} 🏷️ {{{regime}}} 💰 {{{preco}}} 🤖 {{{modelo}}}
{{{analise}}}

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(to_timestamp(timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'DD/MM HH24:MI') AS data_hora,
  regime AS regime,
  CONCAT('$', ROUND(price::numeric, 2)) AS preco,
  model AS modelo,
  plan_text AS analise
FROM btc.ai_plans
WHERE symbol = '$coin'
AND ('$profile' = '.*' OR profile ~* '^$profile$')
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1

panels.description: Sentimento médio das notícias: -1=Bearish, 0=Neutro, 1=Bullish

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(sentiment), 0)::numeric(10,4) AS value FROM btc.news_sentiment WHERE coin = SPLIT_PART('$coin', '-', 1) AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

panels.title: 📰 Sentimento Medio das Noticias

panels.description: Confiança média da classificação de sentimento (0-1)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(confidence), 0)::numeric(10,4) AS value FROM btc.news_sentiment WHERE coin = SPLIT_PART('$coin', '-', 1) AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

panels.title: 🎯 Confianca Media das Noticias

panels.description: Percentual de notícias classificadas como Bullish vs Bearish

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN sentiment > 0.3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::numeric(10,4) AS "Bullish %", COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN sentiment < -0.3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::numeric(10,4) AS "Bearish %" FROM btc.news_sentiment WHERE coin = SPLIT_PART('$coin', '-', 1) AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

panels.title: 📊 Bullish vs Bearish

panels.description: Total de notícias analisadas no período selecionado

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value FROM btc.news_sentiment WHERE coin = SPLIT_PART('$coin', '-', 1) AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

panels.title: 📰 Notícias Analisadas

panels.description: Evolução do sentimento das notícias

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_timestamp(floor(extract(epoch from timestamp) / 900) * 900) AS "time", AVG(sentiment)::numeric(10,4) AS "Sentimento Médio" FROM btc.news_sentiment WHERE coin = SPLIT_PART('$coin', '-', 1) AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT to_timestamp(floor(extract(epoch from timestamp) / 900) * 900) AS "time", (ARRAY_AGG(sentiment ORDER BY timestamp DESC))[1]::numeric(10,4) AS "Última Notícia" FROM btc.news_sentiment WHERE coin = SPLIT_PART('$coin', '-', 1) AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 📈 Sentimento ao Longo do Tempo

panels.description: Notícias mais recentes com classificação de sentimento

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'DD/MM HH24:MI') AS "Data/Hora",
  source AS "Fonte",
  title AS "Título",
  CASE WHEN sentiment > 0.1 THEN 'BULLISH' WHEN sentiment < -0.1 THEN 'BEARISH' ELSE 'NEUTRAL' END AS "Sentimento",
  ROUND(sentiment::numeric, 2) AS "Score",
  ROUND(confidence::numeric, 2) AS "Confiança"
FROM btc.news_sentiment
WHERE coin = SPLIT_PART('$coin', '-', 1)
AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 15

panels.description: Reconstruído a partir dos trades filtrados e snapshot live de preço. Não substitui os saldos live do exchange.

options.content:
💰 Performance & ROI do Modelo Desde {{{primeiro_trade}}}
{{{roi_arrow}}} {{{roi_pct}}}% Reconstruido por trades
Capital Base Modelo
$ {{{initial_capital}}}
Base configurada para o profile
Equity Modelo
$ {{{equity_total}}}
Trades filtrados + marcacao a mercado
PnL Realizado
$ {{{pnl_total}}}
Soma dos trades filtrados
Win Rate
{{{win_rate}}}%
{{{wins}}}W / {{{losses}}}L
Posicao por Trades
{{{position_btc}}} BTC
$ {{{usdt_free}}} caixa do modelo
Preco Medio Entrada
{{{avg_entry_display}}}
{{{entry_context}}}
PnL no período
$ {{{pnl_periodo}}}
{{{trades_periodo}}} trades no período
Total Trades
{{{total_trades}}}
{{{buys}}} buys / {{{sells}}} sells
Este painel reconstrui resultados a partir da tabela de trades filtrada. Os cards marcados como Live usam o saldo e a posicao reportados pelo exchange/exporter em tempo real.
Progresso ROI {{{roi_pct}}}%
Melhor trade: $ {{{best_trade}}} Pior trade: $ {{{worst_trade}}} Dias operando: {{{dias_operando}}}

targets.rawSql:
WITH stats AS (
  SELECT
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(initial_capital), 100) FROM btc.profile_config WHERE ('$profile' = '.*' OR profile ~* '^$profile$')) AS initial_capital,
    count(*) AS total_trades,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE side='buy') AS buys,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE side='sell') AS sells,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE pnl > 0) AS wins,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE pnl < 0) AS losses,
    COALESCE(SUM(pnl), 0)::numeric(12,4) AS pnl_total,
    COALESCE(MAX(pnl), 0)::numeric(10,4) AS best_trade,
    COALESCE(MIN(pnl), 0)::numeric(10,4) AS worst_trade,
    to_timestamp(MIN(timestamp))::date AS first_trade_date
  FROM btc.trades
  WHERE symbol = '$coin'
  AND ('$profile' = '.*' OR profile ~* '^$profile$')
),
open_position AS (
  SELECT GREATEST(COALESCE(
    SUM(CASE
      WHEN side='buy' AND COALESCE(metadata->>'source','') != 'external_deposit' THEN size
      WHEN side='sell' THEN -size
      ELSE 0
    END), 0
  ), 0)::numeric(18,8) AS net_btc
  FROM btc.trades
  WHERE symbol = '$coin'
  AND ('$profile' = '.*' OR profile ~* '^$profile$')
),
price_now AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    (
      SELECT btc_price::numeric
      FROM btc.exchange_snapshots
      ORDER BY timestamp DESC
      LIMIT 1
    ),
    (
      SELECT price::numeric
      FROM btc.trades
      WHERE symbol = '$coin'
      AND ('$profile' = '.*' OR profile ~* '^$profile$')
      ORDER BY timestamp DESC
      LIMIT 1
    ),
    0
  )::numeric(10,2) AS btc_price
),
period_stats AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pnl), 0)::numeric(12,4) AS pnl_periodo, count(*) AS trades_periodo
  FROM btc.trades
  WHERE symbol = '$coin'
  AND ('$profile' = '.*' OR profile ~* '^$profile$')
  AND to_timestamp(timestamp) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
),
entry AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    (SUM(CASE WHEN side='buy' AND COALESCE(metadata->>'source','') != 'external_deposit' THEN funds ELSE 0 END)
     - SUM(CASE WHEN side='sell' THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(funds,0), size*price) ELSE 0 END))
    / NULLIF((SUM(CASE WHEN side='buy' AND COALESCE(metadata->>'source','') != 'external_deposit' THEN size ELSE 0 END)
              - SUM(CASE WHEN side='sell' THEN size ELSE 0 END)), 0), 0
  )::numeric(10,2) AS avg_entry_raw
  FROM btc.trades
  WHERE symbol = '$coin'
  AND ('$profile' = '.*' OR profile ~* '^$profile$')
),
calc AS (
  SELECT
    s.initial_capital,
    s.total_trades, s.buys, s.sells, s.wins, s.losses,
    s.pnl_total, s.best_trade, s.worst_trade,
    COALESCE(TO_CHAR(s.first_trade_date, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), '--') AS primeiro_trade,
    COALESCE((NOW()::date - s.first_trade_date), 0) AS dias_operando,
    ROUND(CASE WHEN s.wins + s.losses > 0 THEN 100.0 * s.wins / (s.wins + s.losses) ELSE 0 END, 1) AS win_rate,
    op.net_btc AS position_btc,
    ROUND((op.net_btc * px.btc_price)::numeric, 2) AS position_usdt,
    ROUND(px.btc_price::numeric, 2) AS btc_price,
    CASE WHEN op.net_btc > 0 THEN e.avg_entry_raw ELSE NULL::numeric(10,2) END AS avg_entry,
    CASE WHEN op.net_btc > 0 THEN CONCAT('$ ', COALESCE(e.avg_entry_raw::text, '--')) ELSE '--' END AS avg_entry_display,
    ROUND(CASE WHEN op.net_btc > 0 AND e.avg_entry_raw IS NOT NULL THEN ((px.btc_price - e.avg_entry_raw) / NULLIF(e.avg_entry_raw, 0) * 100)::numeric ELSE 0 END, 2) AS entry_diff,
    CASE WHEN op.net_btc > 0 AND e.avg_entry_raw IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('Preco live: $ ', ROUND(px.btc_price::numeric, 2)::text, ' (', ROUND(((px.btc_price - e.avg_entry_raw) / NULLIF(e.avg_entry_raw, 0) * 100)::numeric, 2)::text, '%)') ELSE CONCAT('Sem posicao aberta • Preco live: $ ', ROUND(px.btc_price::numeric, 2)::text) END AS entry_context,
    ROUND((s.initial_capital + s.pnl_total + (op.net_btc * (px.btc_price - COALESCE(CASE WHEN op.net_btc > 0 THEN e.avg_entry_raw END, px.btc_price))))::numeric, 2) AS equity_total,
    ROUND((s.initial_capital + s.pnl_total - (op.net_btc * COALESCE(CASE WHEN op.net_btc > 0 THEN e.avg_entry_raw END, px.btc_price)))::numeric, 2) AS usdt_free,
    ROUND((((s.initial_capital + s.pnl_total + (op.net_btc * (px.btc_price - COALESCE(CASE WHEN op.net_btc > 0 THEN e.avg_entry_raw END, px.btc_price)))) - s.initial_capital) / NULLIF(s.initial_capital, 0) * 100)::numeric, 2) AS roi_pct,
    period_stats.pnl_periodo, period_stats.trades_periodo,
    10 AS n_entries
  FROM stats s
  CROSS JOIN open_position op
  CROSS JOIN price_now px
  CROSS JOIN period_stats
  CROSS JOIN entry e
)
SELECT
  c.*,
  CASE WHEN c.roi_pct >= 0 THEN '#73BF69' ELSE '#F2495C' END AS roi_color,
  CASE WHEN c.roi_pct >= 0 THEN '▲' ELSE '▼' END AS roi_arrow,
  CASE WHEN c.pnl_total >= 0 THEN '#73BF69' ELSE '#F2495C' END AS pnl_color,
  CASE WHEN c.pnl_periodo >= 0 THEN '#73BF69' ELSE '#F2495C' END AS pnl_periodo_color,
  CASE WHEN c.avg_entry IS NULL OR c.btc_price >= c.avg_entry THEN '#73BF69' ELSE '#F2495C' END AS entry_color,
  CASE WHEN c.roi_pct >= 0
    THEN 'linear-gradient(90deg, #73BF69, #56A64B)'
    ELSE 'linear-gradient(90deg, #F2495C, #CC3A4A)'
  END AS roi_gradient,
  LEAST(GREATEST(ABS(c.roi_pct), 1), 100) AS roi_bar_width
FROM calc c;

panels.title: 💰 Relatório de Performance & ROI (Modelo)

targets.rawSql:
WITH last_sell AS (
  SELECT
    profile,
    MAX(timestamp) FILTER (WHERE side = 'sell') AS last_sell_ts
  FROM btc.trades
  WHERE symbol = '$coin'
    AND dry_run = false
    AND profile IN ('aggressive', 'conservative')
  GROUP BY profile
),
position_summary AS (
  SELECT
    t.profile,
    CONCAT(
      t.profile,
      '#',
      MIN(t.id),
      CASE WHEN MIN(t.id) <> MAX(t.id) THEN CONCAT('-', MAX(t.id)) ELSE '' END
    ) AS position_ref,
    STRING_AGG(t.id::text, ',' ORDER BY t.id) AS position_trade_ids,
    COUNT(*) AS entries,
    SUM(t.size) AS position_btc,
    SUM(t.size * t.price) / NULLIF(SUM(t.size), 0) AS avg_entry
  FROM btc.trades t
  LEFT JOIN last_sell ls ON ls.profile = t.profile
  WHERE t.symbol = '$coin'
    AND t.dry_run = false
    AND t.side = 'buy'
    AND t.profile IN ('aggressive', 'conservative')
    AND ('$profile' = '.*' OR t.profile ~* '^$profile$')
    AND (ls.last_sell_ts IS NULL OR t.timestamp > ls.last_sell_ts)
  GROUP BY t.profile
),
open_trades AS (
  SELECT
    t.id,
    t.profile,
    t.timestamp,
    t.price,
    t.size,
    ps.position_ref,
    ps.position_trade_ids,
    ps.entries,
    ps.position_btc,
    ps.avg_entry
  FROM btc.trades t
  JOIN position_summary ps ON ps.profile = t.profile
  LEFT JOIN last_sell ls ON ls.profile = t.profile
  WHERE t.symbol = '$coin'
    AND t.dry_run = false
    AND t.side = 'buy'
    AND t.profile IN ('aggressive', 'conservative')
    AND ('$profile' = '.*' OR t.profile ~* '^$profile$')
    AND (ls.last_sell_ts IS NULL OR t.timestamp > ls.last_sell_ts)
),
latest_target AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (profile)
    profile,
    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(metadata->>'target_sell_price', '')::double precision,
      NULLIF(metadata->>'target_sell_trigger_price', '')::double precision
    ) AS sell_target,
    metadata->>'target_sell_reason' AS target_reason
  FROM btc.trades
  WHERE symbol = '$coin'
    AND dry_run = false
    AND side = 'buy'
    AND profile IN ('aggressive', 'conservative')
    AND ('$profile' = '.*' OR profile ~* '^$profile$')
  ORDER BY profile, timestamp DESC, id DESC
),
latest_state AS (
  SELECT
    price AS current_price,
    rsi,
    momentum,
    trend,
    volatility,
    orderbook_imbalance,
    trade_flow,
    spread
  FROM btc.market_states
  WHERE symbol = '$coin'
  ORDER BY timestamp DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
latest_plan AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (profile)
    profile,
    regime,
    TO_TIMESTAMP(timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo' AS plan_at_brt,
    LEFT(REGEXP_REPLACE(plan_text, E'[\n\r]+', ' ', 'g'), 120) AS plan_summary
  FROM btc.ai_plans
  WHERE symbol = '$coin'
    AND profile IN ('aggressive', 'conservative')
    AND ('$profile' = '.*' OR profile ~* '^$profile$')
  ORDER BY profile, timestamp DESC, id DESC
)
SELECT
  ot.id AS "ID",
  ot.position_ref AS "Pos ID",
  ot.profile AS "Profile",
  '🛒 Abrir menu' AS "Ação",
  ot.position_trade_ids AS "Trades IDs",
  ot.entries AS "Entradas",
  ROUND(ot.size::numeric, 8) AS "Size BTC",
  ROUND(ot.position_btc::numeric, 8) AS "Posição BTC",
  ROUND(ot.price::numeric, 2) AS "Entry ID",
  ROUND(ot.avg_entry::numeric, 2) AS "Entry Médio",
  ROUND(ls.current_price::numeric, 2) AS "Preço Atual",
  ROUND(lt.sell_target::numeric, 2) AS "Target Sell",
  ROUND((lt.sell_target - ls.current_price)::numeric, 2) AS "Dist. p/ Target $",
  ROUND(((lt.sell_target / NULLIF(ls.current_price, 0) - 1) * 100)::numeric, 2) AS "Dist. p/ Target %",
  ROUND(
    LEAST(
      100,
      GREATEST(
        0,
        100 * (ls.current_price - ot.avg_entry) / NULLIF(lt.sell_target - ot.avg_entry, 0)
      )
    )::numeric,
    1
  ) AS "Progresso Target %",
  ROUND(((ls.current_price - ot.avg_entry) * ot.position_btc)::numeric, 4) AS "PnL Aberto $",
  ROUND((((ls.current_price / NULLIF(ot.avg_entry, 0)) - 1) * 100)::numeric, 2) AS "PnL Aberto %",
  ROUND(((ls.current_price - ot.price) * ot.size)::numeric, 4) AS "PnL ID $",
  ROUND((((ls.current_price / NULLIF(ot.price, 0)) - 1) * 100)::numeric, 2) AS "PnL ID %",
  ROUND(ls.rsi::numeric, 1) AS "RSI",
  ROUND(ls.momentum::numeric, 3) AS "Momentum",
  ROUND(ls.trend::numeric, 3) AS "Trend",
  ROUND(ls.volatility::numeric, 4) AS "Vol",
  ROUND(ls.orderbook_imbalance::numeric, 3) AS "OB Imb",
  ROUND(ls.trade_flow::numeric, 3) AS "Flow",
  ROUND(ls.spread::numeric, 2) AS "Spread",
  COALESCE(lp.regime, 'N/A') AS "Regime IA",
  TO_CHAR(lp.plan_at_brt, 'DD/MM HH24:MI') AS "Plano IA",
  COALESCE(lt.target_reason, lp.plan_summary, '') AS "Resumo"
FROM open_trades ot
CROSS JOIN latest_state ls
LEFT JOIN latest_target lt ON lt.profile = ot.profile
LEFT JOIN latest_plan lp ON lp.profile = ot.profile
ORDER BY ot.id DESC;

panels.description: Expõe a semântica de multiposição publicada pelo exporter para a posição aberta.

targets.expr: max without(job, instance, coin, exported_coin, exported_profile) ((btc_trading_open_position_raw_entries{coin="$coin",profile=~"$profile"}) or (btc_trading_open_position_raw_entries{exported_coin="$coin",profile=~"$profile"}))

max without(job, instance, coin, exported_coin, exported_profile) ((btc_trading_open_position_logical_slots{coin="$coin",profile=~"$profile"}) or (btc_trading_open_position_logical_slots{exported_coin="$coin",profile=~"$profile"}))

max without(job, instance, coin, exported_coin, exported_profile) ((btc_trading_avg_entry_price{coin="$coin",profile=~"$profile"}) or (btc_trading_avg_entry_price{exported_coin="$coin",profile=~"$profile"}))

panels.title: 🧮 Estrutura Multiposição
